messages.content: Hey! I feel like I’ve been listening to the same stuff on repeat lately 😅 Got any good music recommendations?
Totally get that! I’ve been in a bit of a music rut too. What kind of vibe are you in the mood for? Chill, upbeat, something totally new?
Honestly I’m down for anything, but maybe something a bit upbeat? I need a little energy boost for the week. Throw anything at me—even weird stuff, I’m open 😄

Okay, challenge accepted! 😄 Have you heard of Jungle? Their stuff is super funky and makes me wanna dance every time. Also, Glass Animals always gets me in a good mood. Or if you want something a little weirder, check out Parcels—they’ve got this groovy, retro vibe. Want me to send you a playlist?

Ooh yes, hit me with a playlist! I actually haven’t listened to much Jungle or Parcels, so I’m curious now. Glass Animals I know a bit but could always use more. If you’re looking for recs too, have you heard of Confidence Man? Their stuff is super fun and kind of goofy, makes me wanna dance around the apartment 😂

Oh my gosh, yes! I love Confidence Man, they’re such a blast 😂 Their whole vibe is so fun. Okay, I’ll throw together a playlist for you with some of my favorites from those bands (and a few surprises). I’ll drop the link when it’s ready!

And if you come across anything else weird or dancey, send it my way too! I feel like we’re building the ultimate upbeat playlist here 😎

Deal! I’ll keep my ears open for anything cool and pass it along. Honestly, I kinda love this little music exchange we’ve got going 😂 Who needs Spotify algorithms when you’ve got friends? 

Can’t wait to check out your playlist! If you’re in the mood for something a bit indie but still dancey, give “Keep Moving” by Bronson or anything by Roosevelt a try. Both always put me in a good mood.

Yesss, love Roosevelt! “Keep Moving” is such a bop too, adding that to my queue for today. Honestly, discovering random gems through friends is way better than letting Spotify decide for me 😂 

I just finished the playlist—sent you the link! Let me know what you think, and if any tracks totally miss the mark, feel free to roast my taste haha.

Just gave the playlist a listen and it’s honestly such a vibe! I’m already obsessed with that Parcels track you put on there—how had I never heard them before?? 

Also, zero roasting from me, your taste is solid as always 😄 Let’s keep this going, maybe we should do this every month or something. It’s like our own little music club!

I’m so down for a monthly music club! It’s the perfect excuse to keep digging for new stuff instead of just looping the same albums. Maybe we can even pick a super random genre or theme each time and see what we find—like, “best obscure dance tracks” one month, or “songs to cook dinner to” the next 😂 What do you think?

I love that idea 😂 It’ll keep things fresh and give us a reason to go down some weird Spotify rabbit holes. I’m game for any theme—you know I’m always up for discovering stuff I’d never stumble on otherwise. 

Let’s pick a theme for the first round! Want to go with “obscure dance tracks” or something else? I’m open to literally anything.

Let’s do “obscure dance tracks”—I feel like that’s going to lead to some absolute bangers we’ve never heard before 😂 Maybe we set like a 5-song limit each so it doesn’t get overwhelming? Then we can swap playlists in a week or so. I’m already excited to see what weirdness we both dig up!

Sounds perfect! Five songs each is super manageable, and honestly I’m already thinking about what deep cuts I can find. This is the perfect excuse to finally listen to all those weird playlists I’ve saved but never actually explored 😅

Let’s aim for next week then? And if something’s a little out there, all the better—makes it more fun. Can’t wait to see what you dig up!

Deal! And you know me, I’ll probably end up hunting down some of these tracks on vinyl if I really love them 😅 There’s just something about discovering a new favorite and then finding it in a record shop that hits different. 

But first, playlist hunting—let’s see what gems we can both find!

Haha, I totally get that—finding a record of a new favorite song feels like striking gold. I’ll be over here resisting the urge to buy every cool album I find online 😅

Let’s see what weird corners of Spotify we wander into this week. If I discover anything extra wild, I promise to include it, even if it’s a little questionable. Here’s to uncovering some absolute dance floor oddities!

Absolutely! And honestly, “questionable” tracks are sometimes the ones that grow on you the most 😂 Sometimes I’ll listen to something totally out of left field and then, like a week later, I’m obsessed. 

Oh, and if you find anything with a weird backstory or hilarious lyrics, make sure to share that too—I love a song with a story! This is gonna be so fun.

Totally agree—those songs you’re not sure about at first sometimes end up being your favorites! And I’m 100% in for sharing any weird song stories or funny lyrics I come across, that stuff always makes the music stick in your head even more 😂

Now I feel like the challenge is on to find the most random, danceable track with an absolutely wild origin story. Can’t wait to see what we both come up with! Maybe we’ll discover something so catchy it ends up

on repeat for the next month, haha. I’m excited to see what weird corners of the internet and Spotify we both end up in 😆

If you stumble on anything that makes you immediately think “this is so bad it’s good,” you *have* to include it. Sometimes those tracks are the most fun to talk about. I’ll start digging tonight—I have a feeling my Discover Weekly is about to get really confused by my search history!

Haha, my Discover Weekly is definitely going to think I’ve lost the plot after this! But hey, maybe it’ll start recommending even wilder stuff—could be a win-win 😄

I’ll probably end up texting you mid-search if I find something truly bizarre. Good luck on your hunt tonight! Here’s to finding those “so bad it’s good” gems and maybe even a few new favorites.
Yes, please send me any wild finds as you go! Honestly, half the fun is just sharing the reactions in real time 😂 I’m already bracing myself for some truly od

needle_message:
Deal! And you know me, I’ll probably end up hunting down some of these tracks on vinyl if I really love them 😅 There’s just something about discovering a new favorite and then finding it in a record shop that hits different. 

But first, playlist hunting—let’s see what gems we can both find!
topic: finding new music to listen to
